hero_subtitle: Generous, flame-grilled catering designed for relaxed and memorable outdoor events.
samples_intro: A taste of what we’ve cooked. These are real barbecue menus from real events — from springtime country lunches to corporate days out. Each one is a starting point, not a fixed offering. Tap any menu to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.
